author_rating_explanation: The first author is affiliated with Hong Kong Polytechnic University, which is listed in the top Hong Kong AI schools band (6-8). The last author lists Beijing Institute of Technology, Shandong University, Peking University, and Southern University of Science and Technology. Peking University is a top Chinese institution in the 6-8 band, and SUSTech is also recognized. The last author has very high citations (OpenAlex cited_by_count=6798). Combined, these affiliations place the paper solidly in the 6-8 range, leaning toward the higher end due to Peking University.

author_profiles.name: Zhiqiang Lin
